description:
This advanced multiple-choice quiz rigorously tests deep JavaScript error handling skills, focusing on complex edge cases like serialization pitfalls and cross-context instanceof behavior. Designed for experienced developers, it employs a playful yet challenging tone to push beyond basic try-catch mechanics and separate seasoned professionals from beginners.
Topics: JavaScript error handling, serialization edge cases, cross-context instanceof, advanced debugging
Audience: Experienced JavaScript developers and software engineering professionals
